description_long: This object consists of two modern, rectangular houses facing each other across a central green courtyard with a large tree. Each house features a black exterior with large, floor-to-ceiling glass windows on the side facing the courtyard, allowing for ample natural light and clear views of the shared green space. The roofs are simple and gabled, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The houses are set on a paved platform that frames the courtyard, providing a neat and organized layout. The overall design suggests a communal or duplex living arrangement, with the green space serving as a shared amenity. The materials appear to be a combination of glass, concrete, and metal, with the tree and grass adding natural elements to the scene.
description: Two modern, black gabled houses with large glass windows face each other across a central green courtyard with a prominent tree, all set on a paved platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses facing each other with the central tree and green courtyard clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses and the narrow profile of the tree, with the glass windows facing the courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing both houses and the courtyard, but from the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile of the tree and the glass facades of the houses.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryways facing the courtyard, likely with glass doors and no visible steps or porch.
